question: What should I do to apply for leave due to the death of a family member?
expected_answer: You need to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type 'Death of relative'; no supporting documentation is necessary.
relevant_contexts:
electoral committee to
Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com, confirming that you voted in the corresponding Electoral Department.
Death of relative Leave
In the event of a funeral, the employee is entitled to 2 days of paid leave, according to the Greek legislation.
Leave due to the death of a family member is granted with remuneration in case of the death of a spouse,
children, parents, grandparents and siblings, as well as for first-degree relatives in the same line and degree.
To apply for this type of leave, it is necessary to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type "Death
of relative"; no supporting documentation is necessary.
The type of leaves below cannot be declared through the system. You must request by sending an email to
Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com
Sickness Leave
If your health does not allow you to work, you are required to send a medical leave document issued by your
attending doctor to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
The duration is being registered in SelfService Portal by the Payroll team. According to the law, up to 3 days of
sickness are compensated at 50% of your daily wage by the employer while from the 4th day (continuous
illness), compensation is provided partly by the employer and partly by EFKA (Social Security Institution).
For the cases that sicknesses lasts more than 3 days, the medical leave must be registered in the electronic
platform of EFKA at the following link: https://www.efka.gov.gr/en/sickness-benefit.
After the subsidy decision is issued, the document should be forwarded to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
In the event your health allows you to work, you are required to send a medical document issued by your
attending doctor to Payroll_G

question: What should I do if I receive my military enlistment document?
expected_answer: You must send an email to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com with the military enlistment document attached and inform about your last working day at the company.

Military Service
I received the military enlistment document. How do I inform the company?
After coordinating with your supervisor, you must send an email to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com with the
military enlistment document attached and informing about your last working day at the company.
Kindly note that after the completion of your military service, you can return to the company with an
employment contract. To do so, you must notify HR and payroll team by sending an email to
Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com within the first month of the completion of your military service. Within the
first 15 days of the notification, you are expected to commence officially your duties with the company.
Graduation Day Leave
A special leave for your graduation day is not granted by the law. In that case you may use your annual leave.

question: What should I do if I test positive for COVID-19 and cannot work?
expected_answer: If you cannot work due to your health, you may take up to 3 calendar days' sick leave by submitting the positive test result to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
relevant_contexts:
COVID-19, what should I do? If your health does not allow you to work, you may take up to 3 calendar days' sick leave, by submitting the result
of the positive test to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.  If more days are needed, then you should submit a
doctor’s certificate.
Please promptly notify your Manager and send a doctor's notice to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
However, if your health allows you to work, you may work remotely from the 1st until the 5th calendar day of the
positive test; however, you must still send a rapid test result to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
If after the 5th calendar day, the result of the COVID-19 is still positive, you may continue working remotely for a
maximum of five (5) more calendar days, by submitting the new positive test.

question: How can I reserve a parking slot using the MyPlanner application?
expected_answer: You can request a parking slot every Wednesday from 12pm till Thursday 2pm through the MyPlanner application for the upcoming week.
relevant_contexts:

application. Additionally, the declared working location must always align with the actual presence.
What is the process to make a reservation for parking (parking booking)?
Every Wednesday from 12pm till Thursday 2pm, you may request a parking slot, along with your desk
reservations for the upcoming week through MyPlanner application. By the end of business day on Thursday,
any allocated parking slot/s (upon availability) will be presented in MyPlanner, and a relevant notification will be
sent in your mailbox However, as there might be cancellations within the next days, you may check for any slots
released and available.
Where should I report an issue encountered in MyPlanner?
If you encounter any issue while using the MyPlanner application, please send an email at
MyPlanner@netcompany.com to describe the issue and, if possible, to include a screenshot of the incident or
the message you receive.

question: As a new employee, when can I set my performance and personal development goals?
expected_answer: You should set your goals during the initial period of your employment, within the first quarter following your hiring date.
relevant_contexts:
given to employees who already hold such roles.
I am a newcomer . Am I eligible to set goals? And when?
If you are a new employee, hired until August this year, you should set your performance and personal
development goals during the initial period of your employment. This can be within the first quarter following your hiring date. Your evaluator can guide you in setting SMART goals for the current year. Your evaluator or the
Learning & Talent Development Team can assist you with the submission of the goals into the SAP
SuccessFactors application.
If you are a junior employee and eligible to participate in the 6 months review process, you are eligible to set
goals after the first 18 months of your tenure in the company.

question: How many working days of leave can I take if I travel 450 kilometers for elections?
expected_answer: You can take two (2) working days of leave if you have traveled entirely by road.
relevant_contexts:
�Unpaid leave”.
Elections Leave
• If you travel a distance of 200 – 400 kilometers, one (1) working day of leave is granted.
• If you travel a distance of 401 kilometers and above, two (2) working days of leave are granted, if you have
traveled entirely by road, based on your responsible statement. • If you travel to an island without road access, the number of granted leave days is examined on a case-by-case
basis, depending on the distance and special travel conditions, without, however, exceeding the three (3)
working days of leave.
To apply for this type of leave, you are required to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type
"Elections."
Upon your return, you must send a certification from the locally competent

question: What should I do after the birth of my child regarding my marital status and family information?
expected_answer: You must update your marital status and family status in the Personal Information section through the Self-service portal by uploading the marriage certificate and the birth certificate of your child.
relevant_contexts:
marriage certificate, you must update your marital status in the Personal
Information section through the Self-service portal.
Childbirth Leave (for fathers)
The parental leave is granted as follows: two (2) working days before the expected childbirth date and twelve
(12) working days after the childbirth, or fourteen (14) working days in total after the childbirth date. The days
must be taken within a 30-day period from the date of birth. To apply for this type of leave, it is necessary to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type
“Childbirth”.
Additionally, upon receiving the birth certificate of the child, you are required to update your family status in the
Personal Information section through the Self-service portal, by uploading the relevant document.
Monitor School Performance
Working parents, whether full-time or part-time, are entitled to take up to four (4) working days off per year,
with no pay reduction and employer approval, to visit their child's school. This applies to children up to 18 years
old in elementary or secondary education, and to parents of children with special needs, regardless of age,
attending special education or care programs.
To apply for this type of leave, it is necessary to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type
"Monitor School performance”.
Subsequently, you are required to

question: What is the total duration of maternity leave for working mothers?
expected_answer: Working mothers are entitled to a total of 17 weeks of maternity leave, which includes 8 weeks before the expected date of delivery and 9 weeks postpartum.
relevant_contexts:
COVID-19, no special leave is granted, you are expected to
follow your scheduled plan.
Pregnancy and Postpartum leave
Working mothers are entitled to maternity leave totaling 17 weeks:
• 8 weeks (56 days) mandatory before the expected date of delivery
• 9 weeks (63 days) postpartum days
• The period of compulsory abstinence of women before and after childbirth is considered for the
calculation of Christmas and Easter bonus.
*If the birth takes place earlier than the expected date, the remainder of the leave is granted after the birth, to
complete the 17 weeks.
You are kindly advised to inform directly NCIS Payroll_Greece at Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com
Special Maternity Protection Leave
Special maternity leave is granted to mothers working in the private sector after the end of maternity leave. The
annual leave must have been used already.
• 9 months→ The employee can make use of all or part of it
• During this period, the employee is not entitled to a salary from her employer but receives an allowance
from DYPA (ΟΑΕΔ), which is equal to the minimum wage. Also, DYPA pays a proportion of Easter &
Christmas Bonus and holiday allowance.
• It is recalled that women who have children through surrogacy, as well as employees who adopt, are also
entitled to the special maternity protection benefit , from the child's integration into the family and up to
the age of 8. The mother is also entitled to transfer up to seven months of this leave to the father if the
father is employed full-time or part-time.
You are kindly advised to inform directly NCIS Payroll_Greece Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com

question: What should I do if I forgot my Access Card when arriving at the office?
expected_answer: You must address the reception desk to obtain a visitor's card issued in your name for security reasons and to register your presence in the office.
relevant_contexts:
well, what should I do?
Please contact physicalaccess@netcompany.com
I forgot my Access Card; how can I ensure that the system counts my presence at the office?
Please remember to always use your access card when you work at the office. If for any reason, you arrive at the
company premises and you don’t have your access card with you, then you must address to the reception desk to
obtain a visitor's card issued on your name both for security reasons as well as to register your presence in the
office.
I lost my Access Card, what should I do?
Please contact immediately physicalaccess@netcompany.com and request for a new one. In the meantime, and
until you receive a new access card, you must address the reception desk to obtain a visitor's card issued in your
name both for security reasons as well as to register your presence in the office.
How can I obtain an access card for the internal parking for my car?
You can request a card by sending an email to physicalaccess@netcompany.com, specifying the building/s for
which you need the card/s as well as the car license plate.

question: What type of leave do I need to apply for if I want to take time off to participate in my exams as an undergraduate student?
expected_answer: You need to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type 'Study Leave'.
relevant_contexts:
necessary to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type “Single
Parent Leave”.
Study Leave
If you are an undergraduate student of a public educational institution or an institution supervised by the public
sector, you can receive from your employer an unpaid leave, lasting up to thirty (30) consecutive or non-
consecutive working days annually, for participating in your exams.
For postgraduate students, the study leave is ten (10) days. To apply for this type of leave, it is necessary to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type “Study
Leave”.
Subsequently, you are required to send the certification of your institution for the date you have participated in
the exam to Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
Gynecological Leave
For your gynecological examination, you are entitled to one (1) day of leave with annual remuneration. To apply
for this type of leave, it is necessary to submit a relevant request in NC Self-service under the leave type "Gynecological check-up." Upon your return, you should send the certification from the attending doctor to
Payroll_Greece@netcompany.com.
Blood Donation
Our company schedules blood donation events throughout the year (in our offices in Athens (Maroussi, Orbit,
Syntagma), Thessaloniki, Patras. You are entitled to (1) day off if you participate in the blood donation initiative of
the company, or if you choose to donate blood in an external hospital. In the latter case, you will need to submit a
hospital certificate to Payroll_Greece, to be granted the day off. This absence leave can be used within a period of
3 months from the day entitled.
To apply for this type of leave, it is necessary to submit a request in NC Self-service under the leave type “Blood
Donation”.
Family Sickness Leave

question: How can I get reimbursed for my membership and certification renewal fees?
expected_answer: You must pay the renewal amount, inform your manager, complete the expense claim form with your department's secretariat, and submit it along with proof of payment to the accounting office.
relevant_contexts:

Where should I charge my training hours?
Regarding the billing of the training hours, please contact your responsible manager or PMO to provide you the
WBS element or Cost Center.
Does the company cover the membership costs and the certifications renewals I might have?
The fees for memberships and certification renewals are covered by your department. The steps that should be
followed are:
• You must pay the renewal amount and inform your manager accordingly.
• Next, please contact your department's secretariat to complete the expense claim form, which must be
signed by both you and your manager.
• Finally, please submit the form and the accompanying physical or electronic proof of payment to the
accounting office to initiate the reimbursement process via bank transfer.
How can I become an internal trainer?
If you are an expert in a specific subject area and you are interested in sharing your knowledge within our
company, you may apply as an internal trainer by sending an email to learning@netcompany.com. A colleague
from the learning team will contact you and inform you in the next steps.
Am I eligible to participate in the Agile academy, and when?

one in the near future. Please note that priority is

Single Parent Leave
Single-parent leave is granted to widowed parents and to the single parent who has sole custody of the child. Six
(6) additional days of leave are provided per year for every employee who is a parent without a spouse or
partner and lives with at least one unmarried child dependent on him/her.

question: What is the deadline for creating or editing my work plan for the next working day?
expected_answer: The deadline for creating or editing your work plan for the next working day is 2 pm.
relevant_contexts:
MyPlanner
How can I create my plan for the upcoming week?
The work plan for next week is available every Wednesday after 12pm. The Working Plan for the very next working
day should be made/edited by 2 pm at the latest, as it is required to report the working location at the local
authorities daily.
Also note that every Thursday at 12.00  more desks are available, since the desks that are not reserved in the
designated areas are released.
Choose ‘Create new plan’ on MyPlanner to declare your plan for all days, whether you will be working at the Office,
Home or at the Client side.
You are kindly requested to ensure that your presence at the company premises is aligned with your schedule on
MyPlanner application. If you need to modify your presence, then please make sure you update MyPlanner
accordingly.
How can I change my plan?
If you want to change your plan, it is recommended to choose ‘Edit plan’ on MyPlanner instead of ‘Cancel plan’.
The Working Plan for the very next working day should be made/edited by 2pm at the latest, as it is required to
report the working location at the local authorities daily.
You are kindly requested to ensure that your presence at the company premises is aligned with your schedule on
MyPlanner application. If you need to modify your presence , then please make sure you update MyPlanner
accordingly.
Kindly note that you need to ensure that your plan accurately describes your presence at Home or Client (in case
of a business trip) for the current week. You can update accordingly by Friday 11.59pm for the week that has just
passed.
• Same-day plan creation – You can now create or edit plans for the same day, accommodating last-minute
changes to your work schedule. This option should only be used in exceptional cases when something
unexpected occurs. Please be reminded that working locations are reported to local authorities the day
before. For this reason, it is important to plan schedules in advance, and same-day creation/editing should
remain limited - particularly when changing your “Work from Office” location.
• Extended cancellation window – Plan cancellations will now be possible for the entire week, including
past days.
• Editing past days – You can create and edit plans for previous days within the current week, allowing more
flexibility in finalizing an accurate schedule. This feature applies to “Work from Client Premises" and "Work
from Home" while selecting “Work from the Office” for past dates will remain restricted.

question: How should I update MyPlanner if I have a business trip next week?
expected_answer: You should choose the 'Client' option to specify the name and location for the days of your business trip.
relevant_contexts:
These updates will make MyPlanner even more user-friendly while ensuring continued alignment with company
policies.
If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us at
myplanner@netcompany.com.
I will be on a business trip next week; how should I update MyPlanner?
If you have planned a business trip, for those specific days, please choose the "Client" option to accurately specify
the name and the location in the relevant section.
Kindly note that you need to ensure that your plan accurately describes your presence at Client (in case of a
business trip) for the current week. You can update accordingly by Friday 11.59pm for the week that has just
passed.
I will attend a training/off-site event next week; how should I update MyPlanner?
If you need to attend an off-site event/training, for this specific day please choose the "Client" option to accurately
specify the name and the location.
Kindly note that you need to ensure that your plan accurately describes your presence at Home or Client (in case
of Training) for the current week. You can update accordingly by Friday 11.59pm for the week that has just passed.
I work at client premises only. Should I update MyPlanner?
You must update MyPlanner by choosing the "Client" option to accurately specify the name and the location, since
it is required to report the working location at the local authorities daily.
With that action you ensure that you follow the rules of the hybrid working policy.
How can I book the additional Work From Home (WFH) days provided? Should I do that through
MyPlanner?
Every employee is eligible for one (1) additional WFH day, plus one (1) more for each quarter in the company.
When you make your plan  on MyPlanner and you select the option Home, the available additional WFH days
appear automatically, under the condition that you have already declared the ones available through the hybrid
model policy. You must confirm your decision by clicking on the tick box ‘Do you want to use an extra WFH day?’
and then click Save.

question: What is the maximum amount I can get reimbursed for a certification exam?

?

How can I get reimbursement for a certification I take?
NETCOMPANY - INTRASOFT reimburse examination costs for exams leading to successful accreditation or
certificates relevant to the employee's role, up to a maximum amount of €400 per certificate.
This policy is applicable to all Netcompany-Intrasoft employees with no limit on the number of awards. However,
it does not cover long-term, re-certification, or foreign language examination costs. To view the detailed policy
type ‘Reimbursement’ in the Search field on Intranet | Netcompany

question: What should I do if the building I want to book a desk in is not listed in MyPlanner?
expected_answer: If the building is not listed, it means there are no available desks for your team on that day; you can try booking later, on another day, or in a different building.
relevant_contexts:
I try to book a desk on MyPlanner but the building I am interested in is not included in the drop-
down list. Is there a technical problem? What should I do?
All employees are eligible to book desk at all company sites in Greece (Athens-Thessaloniki-Patras). However, when
a building does not appear in the drop-down list it means that there are no available desks in the designated area
of your team for the selected day. You may try to book a desk later or on another day of the week or in another
building.
Please note that every Thursday at 12.00 more desks are available, since the desks that are not reserved in the
designated areas are released.
If you have tried all the steps above and still you cannot find a desk to book, please inform your manager
accordingly.
All employees are required to pre -register their presence on company/client premises using the My
